title: Light-Omni: Reflex over Reasoning in Agentic Video Understanding with Long-Term Memory
innovation_summary: Light-Omni: Reflex over Reasoning in Agentic Video Understanding with Long-Term Memory: This paper introduces Light-Omni, a multimodal agent framework for reflexive and lightweight video understanding.
